title: Claude Code Just Got Another Huge Upgrade

extracted.hook: Enthropic just dropped another new feature which lets Claude Code actually control your computer which means it can natively use your mouse, your keyboard and take screenshots and do things for you.
transitions: So, today I'm going to show you guys a few demos, talk about when it's useful, and then I'm going to talk about the limitations as well.
Now the only way right now is within the desktop app, which is not a huge deal.
And now that I've already allowed those certain tools like Finder and ClickUp in this session, next time it uses them, it won't have to ask me again for permission.
extracted.cta: "If you enjoyed, if you learned something new, please give it a like. Helps me out a ton."
extracted.analogies: "So, you can literally reach your desktop from your pocket"

"So, you can use this in co-work and in cloud code. So today I'm going to be showing how you use it in cloud code."
